valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Fri 15 May 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Sat 16 May 2026
general_synopsis: Low Fisher 993 expected skaggerak 997 by midday tomorrow

Viking.text:
Wind
In west, northerly or northwesterly 5 to 7, decreasing 3 to 5. In east, cyclonic 2 to 4.
Sea state
In west, moderate or rough, becoming moderate later. in east, moderate, occasionally rough at first.
Weather
Showers.
Visibility
In west, good, occasionally poor. In east, moderate or good.
